decontamination_notes: Real fix from aio-libs/aiohttp PR #13016, merged 2026-06-30, after model training cutoffs, so the specific fix is novel. Parser state-machine change mirrored across http_parser.py and _http_parser.pyx. Repo sliced at base commit (aiohttp/ + pyproject + LICENSE + README); Apache-2.0 LICENSE preserved in repo/. Runs in per-task image vulcanbench/sandbox:aiohttp-13016 (runtime deps only, no aiohttp installed; tests import the workspace package via PYTHONPATH=.). Grading exercises the pure-Python parser; the Cython twin remains in the workspace and the issue states the sync requirement.
